vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inconsistent with the visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels) and P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are not visible as established specimens. The pots appear to contain only soil, debris, and sensor equipment.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: The Pothos is absent; only soil and debris remain.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty. Contains a black sensor stake. No biological growth.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Empty. Contains a white rabbit anchor and debris.
plant_audit.P4_Shared: Not identified as a distinct entity; likely subsumed into the empty black pots.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark, damp, and undisturbed across all pots.
biome_observations.incidental_growth: None detected. No sprouts or moss observed.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Presence of a white, crystalline or crushed-shell-like substance in the black pot (P3 area). A white cylindrical object (likely a tube or bottle) appears in the T-3 and Current frames.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_T-3: Initial state shows empty pots with sensor stakes and white debris.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-1: Introduction of a white cylindrical object (likely a supplement or tool) near the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_current: Return to baseline; object remains, no plant growth observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological dormancy or systemic failure. There is no evidence of living plant tissue in any of the registered containers.
anomalies: White cylindrical object introduced in T-3.
White granular debris in black pots.
Total absence of expected botanical specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: As a botanical observer, I have performed a multi-stage audit of the provided image sequence. The registry provided does not match the physical reality of the desk environment. All pots (P1-P4) are devoid of plant life. The environment appears to be a controlled setup for sensor monitoring, but the biological components are entirely absent or have perished. The white rabbit anchor is present but serves no purpose in a plant-less biome. The introduction of the white cylindrical object suggests ongoing human intervention, but not in the form of botanical care.
